  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to determine the friction coefficients of icy pavements under different amounts of snowfall. The goal is to establish a complete understanding of how varying snowfall levels affect the friction properties of the pavement.",

    "The process is repeated multiple times at different snowfall levels."
